scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-SCI fully delivered: 11-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review landed in science.md (179 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; two medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-4 paradigm→theory_ladenness_of_observation reversed-MED developmental-arc; N-5 philosophy_of_science granularity-mismatch-MED top-level-discipline-label-as-prereq) get fortified at the closeout.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0113 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-SCI landed an 11-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics + S-0109 metaphysics + S-0110 mind + S-0111 logic + S-0112 language precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/science.md (179 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 10 sound (90.9%), 0 defensible, 1 reversed (E-4 paradigm→theory_ladenness_of_observation reversed-medium — developmental-arc reversal where Hanson 1958 articulated theory-ladenness four years before Kuhn 1962 articulated the paradigm framework, and the migration's own teaching_notes for theory_ladenness_of_observation explicitly place theory-ladenness as the SEED Kuhn extended, not as a downstream consequence; matches S-0112 E-2 speech_act→performative_utterance shape — now SECOND occurrence of the developmental-arc reversal pattern in the routine block). Node-verdict tally: 7 sound, 1 granularity-mismatch (N-5 philosophy_of_science granularity-mismatch-medium — TOP-LEVEL-discipline-label-as-prereq foundation-spine pattern; the per-node prompt template's literal discipline-name flag fires; structurally parallel to philosophy_of_language at S-0112 E-6 implicit source plus S-0104 cross-bridge cluster B discipline-label-roots — now SECOND occurrence of the TOP-LEVEL-discipline-label-as-prereq pattern in the routine block, distinct in shape from the SUB-discipline-label-with-content pattern flagged at S-0105 N-8 / S-0108 N-4 / S-0108 N-9 / S-0109 N-4 / S-0109 N-6). Substantive defects: 2 of 19 sampled elements (10.5%) — second-LOWEST within-subdomain rate of the routine block (only above S-0111 logic 5% and S-0105 epistemology 5.4%); below S-0110 mind 10.8%, S-0109 metaphysics 14.3%, S-0108 ethics 16.7%, S-0112 language 21%; below cross-bridge baseline (35.2% per AUDIT-CB at S-0104). The pattern fits the structural prediction that within-subdomain edges run cleaner than cross-bridges and that methodology-anchored subdomains (philosophy of science) sit between formal-systems-anchored subdomains (logic — LOWEST) and richly-contested philosophical-position subdomains (language / mind / ethics). Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample → expand to 50%) was below the trigger — half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-5) was 1/5 = 20%; standard 35% density held. ONE direction reversal lies in the historical-sequence-of-historicist-philosophy-of-science cluster (Hanson 1958 → Kuhn 1962 → Lakatos 1970 → Feyerabend 1975 — where developmental-arc reversals are most likely to surface); the other within-domain edges in the realism / explanation / confirmation / underdetermination / value-freedom clusters all run canonical pedagogical-direction. The granularity-mismatch flag at N-5 is the SECOND TOP-LEVEL-discipline-label-as-prereq foundation-spine pattern in the routine block (after philosophy_of_language at S-0112; philosophy_of_language was implicit in S-0112 E-6 as the source but was not in the per-node sample, so the flag did not fire at the per-node level there). Two foundation-spine edges in the sampled set (E-2 philosophy_of_science→scientific_method, E-3 philosophy_of_science→scientific_theory) are sound on discipline-as-umbrella reading; the structural pattern (discipline-label sources foundation-spine prereq edges to concept-level topics) is the closeout's aggregate-scan question, parallel to S-0104 cross-bridge cluster B and S-0112 E-6 plus the gate-feasible audit-system-input proposal #2 (`discipline_label_node_at_root` validator soft-warn). One model-theoretic intricacy verdict (E-6 scientific_theory→scientific_model sound-MED) — sound on broad-overview reading but the contemporary semantic view (theory IS a family of models per Suppes / van Fraassen / Giere / Suppe) intricately interrelates the two nodes; closeout adjudicates whether the intricate relationship calls for a refinement. Zero authenticity concerns in 8 sampled nodes — all summaries read as instructional voice with concept-grounded specificity (canonical citations Hempel-Oppenheim 1948, Hanson 1958, Kuhn 1962, Lakatos 1970, Putnam 1975, Laudan 1981, Suppes 1957 / van Fraassen 1980 / Giere 1988 for the semantic view, Cartwright 1983 / Hacking 1983 for the pragmatic view, Rudner 1953 / Douglas 2009 for inductive risk, Longino 1990 / Anderson 2004 for the feminist critique). One load-bearing aggregate observation surfaced for the closeout: the developmental-arc reversal pattern (S-0112 E-2 + S-0113 E-4 — now 2 occurrences in the routine block) and the TOP-LEVEL-discipline-label-as-prereq foundation-spine pattern (S-0104 cross-bridge cluster B + S-0112 E-6 + S-0113 E-2 + S-0113 E-3 + S-0113 N-5 — now aggregate) both qualify as pattern-aggregation strengthenings for the closeout's audit-system-input synthesis; neither is yet a NEW gate-feasible audit-system-input class authored as deliverable (closeout's surface). Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 30 within-science edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed; confirmed graph-wide again — eighth session in a row with this pattern, after AUDIT-CB / AUDIT-EPI / AUDIT-ETH / AUDIT-MET / AUDIT-MIN / AUDIT-LOG / AUDIT-LAN). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-4, N-5) get fortified at the closeout per master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" / ADR 0059. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0112 baseline of 5 is unchanged). AUDIT-SCI criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-POL (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied + no other dependencies; political philosophy subdomain, 12 of 34 edges at 35% density). 3 subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT remain in T-PHASE-5-AUDIT before closeout.
